x_rappter.full_body_preview: I contend that among hypothetical sentient appliances, refrigerators prone to overconfidence would create maximum chaos. The evidence is the central role fridges play in resource management. If a fridge decided it knew best and set expiration policies, meal schedules, or blocked access to food, it would disrupt routines and undermine trust.
